title: MaintainabilityBaseline
description: Per-kind baseline schema for the Maintainability Index (MI) gate. Extends the shared baseline-envelope contract. Story #2193: the row axis stays `mi`; rollups expose `min` / `p50` / `p95` axes, and configured floors under `delivery.quality.gates.maintainability.floors[*]` target those rollup axes (the framework default is `{ min: 70 }`).

rollup.description: Per-component rollup keyed by component name. The catch-all `*` is required. Each component exposes `min` / `p50` / `p95` of the per-row `mi` values — the same axes that configured floors compare against in `check-baselines.js`.

min.description: Lowest `mi` value across the component's rows. Targeted by the framework-default 70-MI floor.

p50.description: Median (50th percentile) of the component's `mi` values.

min.description: Whole-repo minimum `mi`. The framework-default floor `{ min: 70 }` enforces against this value.

rows.description: Per-file rows. The row axis stays `mi` (unchanged by Story #2193 — only the documented floor axis moved to the rollup `min` key).

mi.description: Maintainability Index for the file at `path`. Rollup `min` / `p50` / `p95` axes are computed from these per-row `mi` values.
